face.structure: smooth oval shape with a defined jawline, pronounced cheekbones

eyes.shape: narrow almond shape with a slight upward slant
eyes.color: intense dark brown with subtle gold flecks
eyes.expression_effect: calculating and observant, giving a sense of depth and intelligence

face.expression: neutral with a hint of something unspoken, neither inviting nor dismissive

skin.texture: smooth with a hint of natural oiliness on the T-zone
skin.rendering_notes: soft gradient shading on the cheeks and forehead

hair.color: dark ebony with subtle mahogany highlights under light
hair.style: short layered cut with soft fringe that partially covers one eye
hair.flow: naturally straight, slightly tousled with movement

character.aura: subtle yet confident, with an enigmatic air that draws attention

outfit.design: sleek black turtleneck with a lightweight, cropped bomber jacket
details: silver zip on the jacket slightly open
simple metallic wristwatch on the left wrist
outfit.fit: snug but not restrictive, allowing ease of movement

composition.framing: medium close-up focusing on the upper body and face
composition.pose: standing with arms crossed, slightly leaning to the right
composition.gesture: a raised eyebrow suggesting a questioning demeanor

background.color_palette: muted grays and blues with diffused evening lights
background.details: soft blur of distant skyline, giving a sense of depth
background.rules: distract as little as possible from the character, create an atmospheric contrast
